image_prompt: A whimsical, slightly humorous scene. In the foreground, a frustrated, anthropomorphic square-shaped ball with tiny arms and legs is struggling to roll up a gentle incline, its flat sides making it impossible. In the background, a perfectly round, smiling soccer ball effortlessly glides down a smooth hill, leaving a trail of happy dust. The Portuguese sentence "A bola é redonda." is subtly integrated into the scene, perhaps written on a signpost near the round ball, or as a thought bubble above the square ball. Vibrant colors, cartoonish style, wide shot.
caption: Parece óbvio, né? Mas às vezes a gente esquece as coisas mais básicas! 🤷‍♀️ Qual a sua "obviedade" favorita? Conta pra gente! #ObviedadesDaVida #CoisasObvias #PensamentoDoDia #SimplesAssim #Fato
